Default analytics dataset contracts copied to data/contracts/analytics on first run
analysis_scope_rules.json: Rules that constrain analytics samples before AI processing
business_facts.json: Business fact types materialized from knowledge extraction
dedup_rules.json: Cross-source content and semantic deduplication rules
diagnostic_playbooks.json: AI diagnostic playbooks for analytics signals
metrics.json: Metric definitions calculated from analytics facts
monitors.json: Monitor thresholds that create analytics signals
retention_profiles.json: Retention profiles for analytics runtime artifacts
sources.json: Analytics source declarations including IMAP, memory, DMS and API sources
workflow_routes.json: Workflow routes launched from analytics diagnostics
